[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: Overview: A graphic screen shows a red-toned background with centered text and a circular user-style icon.

Main Subject: In the center, there is a circular icon with a gray fill and a white silhouette-like figure inside it, outlined with a red ring.

Setting: The background appears to be an abstract, dark red collage with faint shapes and lines, like a stylized interface backdrop. The overall lighting is dim and tinted red.

Visual Details: The composition is centered with large uppercase text reading “SELAMAT JALAN” in bright pink-red. Below it, there is a bold white line of text reading “Sampai Jumpa Kembali.” Beneath that, a smaller gray line reads “Kayz x Hutao II Assisten [1]” with the same centered alignment. At the lower center, there is a red rounded pill-shaped button with the text “109 Left” in white. Thin geometric red outline marks appear in the corners and along the edges, suggesting a framed UI style. The camera view is straight-on, like a full-screen graphic.

Visible Text: SELAMAT JALAN
Sampai Jumpa Kembali
Kayz x Hutao II Assisten [1]
109 Left

Practical Summary: The image is a centered announcement-style graphic over a dark red abstract background. It displays a circular icon and three lines of text, including a red button-like label indicating “109 Left.”

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
